tasks.title: Add buildDateKeyExpr helper to MagicFacetHandler
tasks.description: Add private helper buildDateKeyExpr(string $field, string $interval): string that returns TO_CHAR($field, '<pg-pattern>') on PostgreSQL and DATE_FORMAT($field, '<my-pattern>') on MariaDB/MySQL, with CONCAT(YEAR($field), '-Q', QUARTER($field)) for the quarter interval on MariaDB.

tasks.title: Replace three TO_CHAR call sites with helper
tasks.description: Replace the three TO_CHAR(...) call sites in MagicFacetHandler with the helper: getDateHistogramFacetUnion() line 812, getDateHistogramFacet() lines 1310 and 1338.

tasks.title: Fix misleading Nextcloud-default comment
tasks.description: Correct the misleading comment at MagicFacetHandler.php:1308 ('Nextcloud default' is not PostgreSQL); replace with a neutral comment describing the platform branch.

tasks.title: Verify existing tests on both DBs
tasks.description: Run the existing MagicFacetHandlerIntegrationTest suite on MariaDB (docker-compose.mariadb-test.yml) and confirm no regressions on PostgreSQL (docker-compose.yml).

tasks.title: Manual smoke test in dev environment
tasks.description: Manually verify in the dev environment: GET /apps/openregister/api/objects?_facets=<date-field>&_schema=<id> returns populated buckets on MariaDB for interval: year and interval: month.

tasks.title: MariaDbFacetHandler week format %Y-%u → %x-%v
tasks.description: Change MariaDbFacetHandler::getDateFormatForInterval() week case from '%Y-%u' to '%x-%v' (ISO year + ISO week).

tasks.title: MetaDataFacetHandler week format %Y-%u → %x-%v
tasks.description: Change MetaDataFacetHandler::getDateFormatForInterval() week case from '%Y-%u' to '%x-%v' (same parity).

tasks.title: Fix week-bounds bug via setISODate
tasks.description: Replace the buggy strtotime($dateKey) week-bounds code in MagicFacetHandler::getDateBoundsForBucket() (lines ~1411-1419) with DateTime::setISODate() matching the correct implementation already present in MariaDbFacetHandler::getDateBoundsForBucket() (lines ~435-445).

tasks.title: Verify 2-digit ISO week regex compatibility
tasks.description: Confirm MariaDbFacetHandler::getDateBoundsForBucket() week regex still accepts 2-digit ISO week from %x-%v output (pattern /^(\d{4})-(\d{1,2})$/); widen/pad if needed to handle 2-digit week consistently.

tasks.title: Remove dead legacy QueryBuilder block
tasks.description: Audit MagicFacetHandler::getDateHistogramFacet() lines 1306-1325: remove the dead 'Fallback: Build query manually (legacy behavior)' $queryBuilder block that is unconditionally overwritten at line 1328. Confirm no private caller bypasses searchHandler/$schema.

tasks.title: testDateHistogramYearOnMariaDB
tasks.description: Add testDateHistogramYearOnMariaDB() to MagicFacetHandlerIntegrationTest — inserts rows across 3 years, asserts bucket keys '2023'/'2024' with correct counts and from/to bounds.

tasks.title: testDateHistogramMonthOnMariaDB
tasks.description: Add testDateHistogramMonthOnMariaDB() — asserts '%Y-%m' format buckets and chronological ordering.

tasks.title: testDateHistogramDayOnMariaDB
tasks.description: Add testDateHistogramDayOnMariaDB() — asserts '%Y-%m-%d' format buckets.

tasks.title: testDateHistogramWeekIsoOnMariaDB
tasks.description: Add testDateHistogramWeekIsoOnMariaDB() — inserts a row dated 2023-01-01 (Sunday, ISO week 52 of 2022), asserts bucket key '2022-52'.

tasks.title: testDateHistogramQuarterOnMariaDB
tasks.description: Add testDateHistogramQuarterOnMariaDB() — asserts keys '2024-Q1', '2024-Q3' via CONCAT(YEAR(...), '-Q', QUARTER(...)).

tasks.title: testDateHistogramYearOnPostgresUnchanged
tasks.description: Add testDateHistogramYearOnPostgresUnchanged() — regression guard: SQL still uses TO_CHAR(..., 'YYYY').

tasks.title: testWeekBoundsUseIsoWeek
tasks.description: Add testWeekBoundsUseIsoWeek() — unit test: getDateBoundsForBucket('2025-12', 'week') returns {from: '2025-03-17', to: '2025-03-23'}, not December 2025.

tasks.title: testWeekBoundsWeekOneOfIsoYear
tasks.description: Add testWeekBoundsWeekOneOfIsoYear() — getDateBoundsForBucket('2024-01', 'week') returns {from: '2024-01-01', to: '2024-01-07'}.

tasks.title: Gate DB-specific tests via markTestSkipped
tasks.description: Gate DB-specific assertions with markTestSkipped() when getDatabasePlatform() does not match.

tasks.title: composer check:strict green
tasks.description: Run composer check:strict — all PHPCS/PHPMD/Psalm/PHPStan green. Fix any pre-existing issues touched by the diff (per CLAUDE.md rule).

tasks.title: Full PHPUnit suite on both DBs
tasks.description: Run full PHPUnit suite against both DB services in docker-compose (PostgreSQL default + docker-compose.mariadb-test.yml).

tasks.title: Smoke-test dependent apps on MariaDB
tasks.description: Smoke-test downstream apps: run opencatalogi and softwarecatalog facet requests against a MariaDB-backed dev instance and confirm date-based filters produce buckets.

tasks.title: CI passes on both matrix jobs
tasks.description: Confirm CI runs the MariaDB matrix job from mariadb-ci-matrix spec and both jobs pass on the PR.

tasks.title: Update faceting-configuration spec header
tasks.description: Update openregister/openspec/specs/faceting-configuration/spec.md: add this change to the OpenSpec changes list in the header; confirm Status line reflects in-progress while change is active.
